info.title: Caller Phone Number (Client Action)
info.description: A client-side tool, not a real HTTP API -- GuideAnts never calls the server URL below. Paste this as a 'Client Actions' tool source (Add Tool Source > Client Actions) rather than 'Web API'. When the guide calls get_caller_phone_number, GuideAnts hands the call back unresolved to whichever client is on that conversation; the Twilio demo app (app/guide_client.py) answers it directly with the current call's caller ID, which only it knows. See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md's 'Client-side tool calls' section.

servers.description: The client:// scheme is what marks this as a Client Actions source in GuideAnts -- it is never actually dialed.

get.summary: Get the phone number of the caller currently on this call
get.description: Takes no arguments. Use this to get the caller's own phone number, e.g. to offer it as a reservation or callback number instead of asking for it. May return a null phone_number if it isn't available for this call.

phone_number.description: The caller's phone number as provided by Twilio caller ID, or null if unavailable
